Javascript.HintText: Enter the date first instalment is due (leave blank if not applicable)
Javascript.isMandatory: var val = Services.getValue(InstalmentAmount.dataBinding); return( null != val && val.length != 0 );
Javascript.isEnabled: var val = Services.getValue(InstalmentAmount.dataBinding); return ( null != val && val.length != 0 );

Context.isEnabled: var payDate = Services.getValue(PaymentDate.dataBinding); return('Y' != Services.getValue(JudgmentForthwith.dataBinding) && ( null == payDate || "" == payDate ));

Context.HintText: Enter the first instalment date in the format DD-MON-YYYY
Enter the first installment date in the format DD-MON-YYYY
Enter the first instalment date in the format DD-MON-YYYY
